channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: 3 Genius Stocks I'm Buying Instead of the SpaceX IPO
item.description: SpaceX IPO may be popular, but there are better options available.

item.title: This Low-Mileage 2025 Tesla Model Y Lost A Lot Of Range Fast
item.description: After 18 months and just over 13,000 miles, Tesla’s own battery-health test showed a result its owner called unacceptable.

item.title: SpaceX Surge Further Boosts Saudi Billionaire Prince’s Fortune
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Friday’s debut share surge for SpaceX is bolstering the fortunes of one of Saudi Arabia’s richest men. Most Read from BloombergWhy Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Biggest IPOTrump Eyes Sunday Iran Deal But Tehran Says Still Reviewing TextAnthropic Shuts Down Mythos ...

item.title: Can Rivian Beat Tesla in the Long Term?
item.description: Rivian began delivering its affordable R2 fleet this week in a push to bring the company to the mainstream.

item.title: Elon Musk Is Now the World's First Trillionaire. For Tesla Shareholders, the More Important Question Is What Comes Next.
item.description: A second Musk-led megacap is now publicly traded -- and that quietly changes a few things for the electric-car maker's investors.

item.title: Observations After Two Weeks with Tesla Hardware 4 & Full Self Driving V14 in My 2026 Tesla Model Y
item.description: I lived through almost 7 years of numerous releases of Tesla’s Full Self Driving (FSD) as it progressed in my 2019 Model 3 using “Hardware 3” (HW3), finally reaching FSD V12. Elon Musk promised every year that all of us Tesla owners with HW3 would see Level 4 self-driving in ... [continued] The...

item.title: Former Tesla board member issues candid message on SpaceX stock
item.description: Venture capitalist Steve Westly says SpaceX is "three moonshots in one company" and the math only works if most of them pay off. On June 12, SpaceX (SPCX) just pulled off the biggest initial public offering in stock market history. The company raised $75 billion, priced shares at $135 each, ...

item.title: Tesla’s Level 2++ Supervised Full Self-Driving Approved In Belgium
item.description: Tesla has gotten “Full Self Driving (Supervised)” approved in another European country. Following the Netherlands, Lithuania, Estonia, and Denmark, the driver-assist system is now allowed to be deployed in Belgium. Well, Tesla still has to pass some tests with it, and then it can be rolled out to...

item.title: The Big ICE Meltdown — May’s China EV Sales Report
item.description: ICE model sales crash 39% in May High gas prices and a never ending wave of new models has allowed May to reach record EV market share, with plugins reaching a record 63%! However, while record market share was achieved in the past thanks to strong EV sales, this time, ... [continued] The post ...

item.title: Cathie Wood Buys 3.3 Million SpaceX Shares On IPO Day
item.description: Cathie Wood's firm ARK Invest staked a large position in Elon Musk's SpaceX on Friday. The firm already has a huge chunk of Tesla stock.

item.title: SpaceX's Nasdaq Debut Puts Bitcoin On 25% Of 'Mag8' Balance Sheets, Strategy’s Michael Saylor Says
item.description: FTSE Russell confirmed SpaceX will join the Russell 1000 and Russell Top 200 on June 26, with MSCI adding it to its standard and large-cap indexes on June 29.

item.title: Gary Black Predicts TSLA Selling Ahead Of SpaceX IPO—Ross Gerber Says Investors Treating It Like 'Free Money'
item.description: The upcoming SpaceX IPO, which is scheduled to kick off on Friday, June 12, could result in Tesla Inc. investors exiting their positions in the EV giant, according to investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC. Investors To ‘Lighten’...

item.title: ArcBest Expands Tesla Semi Fleet As EV Trials Meet Core Freight Goals
item.description: ArcBest's ABF Freight unit is expanding its electric trucking program with new Tesla Semi trucks beyond its initial California and Nevada pilot route. This move shifts the Tesla Semi use from a limited trial to broader deployment across more of ArcBest's network. Early feedback points to a positi...

item.title: MarketBeat Week in Review – 06/08 - 06/12
item.description: Stocks rallied on optimism surrounding a potential U.S.-Iran peace deal and SpaceX's historic IPO debut, reinforcing investor confidence and market momentum

item.title: Mag 7? MANGOS? SpaceX forces name rethink on Wall Street's tech-stock moniker
item.description: SpaceX roared into markets this past week with a valuation of more than $2 trillion, surpassing two members of Wall Street's "Magnificent Seven" and raising a key question: Does the Mag 7 name still fit? ‌And if not, what should replace it? The IPO, the biggest in U.S.

item.title: TSLA Stock Recovers To Close Nearly 2% Higher As SpaceX IPO Debuts
item.description: SPCX ended its debut trading session up 19%, while TSLA closed Friday 2% higher.

item.title: SpaceX shares soar 19% in stock market debut
item.description: STORY: The world's biggest ever IPO ended with Elon Musk's SpaceX gaining 19% in its debut session Friday, as investors piled into the rocket company, betting on its now-trillionaire CEO [beat] and the prospect of putting AI in space. Friday's debut gave SpaceX a valuation of more than $2 trillio...

item.title: Will the Magnificent Seven Will Give Way to the Dirty Dozen?
item.description: Did SpaceX just boot Tesla from the Magnificent Seven? With its first trading-day valuation of $2.1 trillion, SpaceX is worth more than Tesla ($1.8 trillion based on its fully diluted share count) and Meta Platforms. The top six U.S.

item.title: How much money did Elon Musk make in SpaceX’s stock market debut?
item.description: He’s now the world’s first trillionaire, after his rocket and AI company broke IPO records on its way to a $2.1tn valuation

item.title: Tesla, SpaceX, and the Battle to Be Musk’s Most Valuable Company
item.description: SpaceX trading began, officially making Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk a trillionaire. SpaceX is worth more to Musk than Tesla, but which company will turn out more valuable to investors is harder to say. Tesla stock rose 1.8% on Friday, closing at $406.43, while the and gained 0.5% and 0.7%...

item.title: What's Next For SpaceX
item.description: The SpaceX drama, however, is just beginning. SpaceX completed its record-setting IPO on Thursday, and it closed just under $161 on Friday, up 19% from the $135 IPO price, valuing Musk's rocket company at $2.1 trillion. Now investors have to brace for SpaceX to be included in the Nasdaq 100 inclu...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rose Along With SpaceX
item.description: Turns out the SpaceX IPO didn't do much of anything to Tesla stock. Shares of Musk's EV maker rose 1.8% on Friday to close at $406.43, while shares of Musk's rocket company rose 19.2% to close at $160.95. There was significant concern that Tesla investors would sell their stock to buy SpaceX shar...

item.title: Tesla: The Battery Moat Is Becoming Thinner
Update: Equities Rise as SpaceX Soars; Wall Street Logs Weekly Gain Amid Iran Deal Optimism
item.description: (Updates with market moves at the end of the day.) US equities advanced Friday to lock in a weekl

item.title: SpaceX Passes Tesla as Most Valuable Company in Musk’s Portfolio
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- When it comes to the interconnected companies of Elon Musk, Tesla Inc. is no longer the big man on campus.Most Read from BloombergSpaceX IPO Raises $75 Billion in Biggest Debut of All TimeUS, Iran Edge Toward Interim Deal Signing Close to G7 Next WeekXbox Plans Significant Layoffs ...

item.title: What's at Stake for Trillionaire Elon Musk and SpaceX After Blockbuster IPO
item.description: The pressure is on the company—and newly minted trillionaire Elon Musk—to deliver.

item.title: Is it too late to buy SpaceX’s stock? Here’s how Tesla’s did after one day — and five years.
item.description: Also in Weekend Reads: A bitcoin-pricing model that looks way ahead, the bear market for gold and retirement-planning advice.

item.title: SpaceX rockets to $2.1 trillion valuation on stock market debut
item.description: SpaceX shares rocketed after Elon Musk kicked off the biggest stock market listing in history, valuing the company at more than $2tn.

item.title: SpaceX president Gwynne Shotwell just gave another hint at a Tesla merger
item.description: A SpaceX-Tesla merger seems inevitable.

item.title: Elon Musk May Be a Trillionaire, but Tesla Is Still Down 11% in 2026. Is TSLA Stock Dead Weight Now?
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk made history earlier today by reportedly becoming the world’s first trillionaire, fueled largely by SpaceX‘s (NASDAQ:SPCX) blockbuster NASDAQ debut. Yet, Tesla stock is barely budging on the news, trading near $403 and up 1% in midday action on Friday. The discon...

item.title: Top Venture Capital Investor: Elon Musk Has ‘De-Risked All the Physics’ Behind Starlink and Colossus
item.description: SpaceX began trading on NASDAQ this morning, and one of the company’s longtime venture capital backers offered a loud endorsement. On CNBC’s Squawk Pod, David George, a partner at venture capital giant Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), said Elon Musk’s space and AI businesses have largely solved their ...

item.title: Wealth Expert: SpaceX IPO Will Likely Make Elon Musk the World’s First Trillionaire
item.description: CNBC Wealth Editor correspondent Robert Frank delivered a milestone moment on air this morning, saying: “By the end of today, Elon Musk will likely become the world’s first trillionaire.” This comes as the result of the long-awaited SpaceX IPO, which is poised to revalue Musk’s privately held sta...

item.title: Forget Billionaire Lists: Elon Musk Is Worth More Than $1 Trillion After the SpaceX IPO
item.description: The world's wealthiest person just got even richer after successfully launching the world's biggest IPO in history.

item.title: Elon Musk Becomes World's First Trillionaire as SpaceX Hits $2 Trillion
item.description: Elon Musk Hits Stunning Trillionaire Milestone As SpaceX Soars

item.title: See Elon Musk at Nasdaq for market open as SpaceX goes public
item.description: SpaceX shares opened at $150 on Friday, June 12, and popped above its IPO price of $135 per share, making Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.

item.title: Tesla stock slides as investors turn to Musk’s crown jewel SpaceX
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares fell about 2% on Friday as investor attention moved to the market debut of SpaceX.

item.title: SpaceX IPO: Nasdaq is the home for 'the trillion dollar companies'
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPCX) began trading on the Nasdaq after its IPO on Friday, June 12. Nasdaq (NDAQ) President Nelson Griggs sits down with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi and Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman to discuss the public debut, making SpaceX the second Elon Musk-run company...

item.title: Update: SpaceX Shares Surge in Nasdaq Debut
item.description: (Updates with recent stock movement in first and second paragraph.) Space Exploration Technologie

item.title: Stocks Rise as SpaceX Shares Begin Trading
item.description: U.S. stocks gained in midday trading after SpaceX shares began trading 11% higher than their IPO price.

item.title: SpaceX Raises Record $75 Billion in Historic IPO, Reaches $1.8 Trillion Valuation
item.description: SpaceX just rewrote the IPO record book. The company sold more than 555 million shares at $135 each, raising $75 billion and landing a valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion. According to CNBC’s Melissa Lee, that places SpaceX as the seventh most valuable U.S.

item.title: SpaceX Soars 30% in Record $75 Billion Debut as Elon Musk Becomes the World’s First Trillionaire
item.description: Shares of SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) are up 30% in midday trading Friday after the company completed the largest IPO in history. SPCX stock traded near $175, well above the $150 open and the $135 IPO price set Thursday night. This ranks among the most closely watched NASDAQ debuts in years.

item.title: Tesla vs BYD: The Better EV Stock To Buy In June
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and BYD (OTC: BYDDF) sit on opposite sides of the global EV map. Tesla’s Q1 2026 report delivered a margin rebound and another lift in AI subscriptions. BYD, the Shenzhen volume leader, is being repositioned by Beijing’s anti-involution campaign aimed at consolidating EV winn...

item.title: Musk Is Officially the World’s First Trillionaire
item.description: SpaceX shares surged after the company's Nasdaq debut Friday, giving the company a market capitalization of more than $2 trillion. That values Musk's stake at roughly $1.1 trillion. Combined with his Tesla position and other assets, Musk is worth about $1.

item.title: Elon Musk becomes world’s first trillionaire after SpaceX mega float
item.description: His fortune has been boosted by the sky-high valuation of his rocket and artificial intelligence firm SpaceX on its stock market debut.

item.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX soars to two trillion dollars in record-breaking IPO
item.description: It makes Tesla and X owner Mr Musk – already a billionaire – the world’s first paper trillionaire.

item.title: Musk’s Space X Goes Public: What Makes This IPO Different
item.description: WSJ’s Becky Peterson reports from the Nasdaq where Elon Musk’s SpaceX launches the largest IPO in history.

item.title: SpaceX Jumps 21% as Blockbuster Debut Pushes Market Valuation Above $2 Trillion
item.description: Shares of Space Exploration Technologies (SPCX) were rallying 21% on Friday as Elon Musk's rocket an

item.title: SpaceX, Tesla, EchoStar, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: The market’s narrative on Friday was pretty simple: the debut of Elon Musk’s rocket and artificial-intelligence company SpaceX. SpaceX debut impacted other space stocks during the trading session. Investors see the satellite maker as a proxy for SpaceX because it reached a deal last year to sell ...

item.title: Wall Street climbs as SpaceX shares launch, oil slides on Mideast deal hopes
item.description: Wall Street pushed higher on Friday as SpaceX shares began trading following world's largest initial public offering, while oil prices slid on hopes of an agreement to end the Middle East war.US President Donald Trump said on Thursday an agreement to end the Middle East war could be signed in day...

item.title: SpaceX Surges 19% in Nasdaq Debut
item.description: Shares of Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPCX) rallied 19% on Friday as the rocket and satellite company debute
